hero.title: The prestige bakery of Algiers' finest addresses.
hero.subtitle: Viennoiseries, traditional breads and exceptional pastries, delivered each morning to the cafés, hotels and tables that define the elegance of Algiers.

catalogue.title: Our menu
catalogue.subtitle: Products prepared fresh every day, in the purest tradition.

product.notFound: This product does not exist or is no longer available.

maison.title: Baking excellence, at the heart of Algiers
maison.lead: A house born of a single obsession: bringing French baking craft to the highest level of exigence, for the addresses that shape the taste of Algiers.
maison.p1: Every morning, our artisans hand-shape butter viennoiseries, slow-fermented traditional breads and exceptional pastries. No production line, no shortcuts — only the right gesture and carefully chosen ingredients.
maison.p2: We built this house for a clientele that never compromises on quality: the great modern cafés, prestigious hotels and restaurants of Algiers, and individuals in search of the very best.
maison.p3: Our catalogue is deliberately tight, conceived as a curated menu: each product earns its place because, in our eyes, it is beyond reproach.
maison.value1Text: Artisanal shaping, every day, with no industrialisation.
maison.value2Text: AOP butter, natural leavens, hand-selected raw materials.
maison.value3Text: An exigence designed for the finest tables of Algiers.

contact.title: Let's talk about your needs
contact.subtitle: Leave us your details and we'll call you back to compose your bespoke order. You can also reach us directly.
contact.messagePlaceholder: E.g. daily viennoiserie delivery for my café…
contact.successText: Our team will call you back very soon to finalise your order.
contact.errName: Please provide your first and last name.
contact.errPhone: Please provide a valid phone number.
contact.privacy: We use this information solely to call you back.
